name: Marketing - AI Video Studio
description: Public-facing landing page for an AI video studio product. Communicates vision, showcases features and workflow, presents pricing tiers, and drives signups with social proof.

page_briefs.home: Long-scroll marketing landing. Opens with a vision-preset hero featuring an ambitious headline, sub-headline, dual CTA buttons (primary signup, secondary watch demo), and an immersive cinematic background video reel. A features grid follows with 3-4 columns of icon + headline + copy cards highlighting timeline editing, character consistency, prompt direction, and one-click rendering. Below, a how-it-works section walks through three numbered steps (write, direct, render) with animated illustrations. A pricing section presents tiered cards (starter, pro, studio) with feature checklists and contrasting primary-tier highlight. Testimonials section shows customer quote cards with avatar, name, and company logo. Page closes with a full-width cta-section containing final conversion headline and signup action. Top nav offers product, pricing, docs, and login links; footer holds company, legal, and social links.

shells.top-nav-footer: Public marketing layout with top navigation bar and footer
